CustomField.description: Numeric value of the supplement. Interpretation depends on Calculation_Method__c: if Percentage → 8.00 means +8%; if Fixed → 75.00 means +75 in the currency specified by Currency_Code__c.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Value of the supplement. For Percentage: enter 8 for +8%. For Fixed: enter 75 for +75 in the defined currency.
CustomField.label: Supplement Value
